subject_information.address: 230 Tiffany Mountain Suite 863, South Michael, KY 25205

suspicious_activity.narrative: Michael Stanley (ID: CUST_0062) exhibited suspicious activity consistent with money laundering. High transaction volumes and large balances were observed in his account. Notably, on 2025-07-27, an incoming wire transfer of $98,090.16 was credited to his account. Subsequently, four large outgoing wire transfers totaling $71,181.08 were recorded between 2025-07-28 and 2025-07-29. This pattern of activity, involving large, rapid movements of funds, is indicative of potential money laundering.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Step 1: High volume of transactions and large balances in accounts. Step 2: Unusual volume and high-risk methods (wire transfers). Step 3: Matches SAR filing requirements (31 CFR 1020.320). Step 4: High risk due to large transaction amounts and frequency of suspicious activity. Step 5: Classified as Money Laundering due to high volume and suspicious wire transfers.
